raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 3,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the inconsistency between the introduction of Adaptive Temporal Attention (ATA) and the subsequent description of a selective state-space model. Proposes a solution by recommending to choose one framing: either SSM or attention.",
    "R1.2": "Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., comparing to Transformers without a specific baseline).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the inconsistency between the introduction of Adaptive Temporal Attention (ATA) and the subsequent description of a selective state-space model. Proposes a solution by recommending to choose one framing: either SSM or attention.
rationale.R1.2: Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., comparing to Transformers without a specific baseline).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
